untranslatable_reason: Pattern detection (Ending Diagonal Broadening) requires visual/structural pattern recognition not available in allowed indicators. Yearly position context requires multi-timeframe analysis beyond single-bar indicators. Throwback/pullback behavior (~50%) requires post-breakout pattern tracking. Success rates by market regime are AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be operationalized.
translation_notes: Approximated breakout detection using Donchian channel crosses as proxy for diagonal broadening pattern breakout. Used price_pos_20 to capture yearly position context (lower third = <0.33). Entry logic requires both breakout AND favorable yearly position. Exit uses reversal through opposite channel boundary. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per original signal. Parameters like success_rate, volume_trend marked AUTHOR_SILENT have been omitted as they cannot be quantified from source text.
